package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInline() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_runs_authorization_business_rules_inline"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that contain complex permission matrices instead of delegating to policy or service logic."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
